innovation_1.name: 基于三层角信号分解的几何特征材质分类机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that the entanglement of material properties in mixed-reflection scenes creates a fundamental bottleneck for accurate depth estimation.

innovation_2.name: 面向混合反射场景的统一双掩码（Dual-Mask）深度估计架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose an integrated framework that sequentially combines a three-layer angular signal decomposition mechanism for material classification with a unified dual-mask architecture for robust depth estimation.
